title: API v2 - change people column error 500

posts.author: abalest14 (Alessandro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good morning, i am trying the api v2 from “the try it yourself” editor, sending this mutation:
mutation {
change_multiple_column_values (board_id: xxxx, item_id: xxxxx, column_values: “{"stato": {"label": "Working on it"},"timeline":{"from":"2019-06-03","to":"2019-06-07"},"data":{"date":"2019-06-03"},"persone":{"personsAndTeams":[{"id":xxxxx,"kind":"person"}]}}”) {
id
}
}
i get back an internal server error code 500, if i remove this part:
,\"persone\":{\"personsAndTeams\":[{\"id\":xxxxx,\"kind\":\"person\"}]}

then it work fine.
where is the mistake?
thanks

posts.author: Ayelet (Ayelet Holtzman)
posts.cookedHtml:
seems like the correct mutation. can you make sure “persone” column is a multiple person column and not a person column?
you can use this query to do so:

boards(ids:xxx){
  columns{
    title
    type
    id
  }
}

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @abalest14 – thanks for sending that over.

Let’s solve this over a ticket. I just sent you a direct message following up.

Cheers,
Dipro

posts.author: scumbletest (scott)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m having the same problem. Did you get this fixed? If so, how?

posts.author: mientjan (mient-jan)
posts.cookedHtml: Switch to V1 of the api. V2 is not finished has a lot of bugs and is missing a lot of functionality.

posts.author: tomgoirand (thomas goirand)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I am having the same issue.

Here is my code:
{

“query”: "mutation {\n change_column_value(board_id: 657972484, item_id: 627338655, column_id: “person”, value: "{“personsAndTeams”:[{“id”:11161799,“kind”:“person”}]} “) {\n id\n} }”

}

posts.author: tomgoirand (thomas goirand)
posts.cookedHtml: @dipro did you manage to solve the issue from this topic? Interested too.
